versions.version_description: Simplified and more easy to read for piano players.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Girl im in love with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
This ain't the honeymoon[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
Past the infatuation phase[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Right in the thick of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
At times we get sick of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]
It seems like we argue everyday[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
I know i misbehaved[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
And you made your mistakes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                          [ch]G[/ch]
And we both still got room left to grow[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F[/ch]
And though love sometimes hurts[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I still put you first[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
And we'll make this thing work[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D[/ch]
But I think we should take it slow[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
We're just ordinary people[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                        [ch]G[/ch]
We don't know which way to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
Cuz we're ordinary people[/tab]
[ch]C[/ch]                                 [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
Maybe we should take it slow (Take it slow oh oh ohh)[/tab]
[ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]
This time we'll take it slow (Take it slow oh oh ohh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
This time we'll take it slow[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
This ain't a movie no[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
No fairy tale conclusion ya'll[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                        [ch]G[/ch]
It gets more confusing everyday[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Sometimes it's heaven sent[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Then we head back to hell again[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                              [ch]G[/ch]
We kiss then we make up on the way[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]
I hang up you call[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
We rise and we fall[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                      [ch]G[/ch]
And we feel like just walking away[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
As our love advances[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
We take second chances[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Though it's not a fantasy[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]D[/ch]
I Still want you to stay[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]
We're just ordinary people[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                        [ch]G[/ch]
We don't know which way to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
Cuz we're ordinary people[/tab]
[ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]
Maybe we should take it slow (Take it slow oh oh ohh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
This time we'll take it slow (Take it slow oh oh ohh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]
This time we'll take it slow[/tab]


[Verse 3]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Take it slow[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Maybe we'll live and learn[/tab]

Maybe we'll crash and burn
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Maybe you'll stay, maybe you'll leave,[/tab]

maybe you'll return
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Maybe another fight[/tab]

Maybe we won't survive
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
But maybe we'll grow[/tab]
[tab]                                               [ch]C[/ch]
We never know baby youuuu and I[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]Am[/ch]
We're just ordinary people[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                     [ch]G[/ch]
We don't know which way to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]
Cuz we're ordinary people[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                   [ch]G[/ch]
Maybe we should take it slow (Heyyy)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
We're just ordinary people[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                       [ch]G[/ch]
We don't know which way to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]Am[/ch]
Cuz we're ordinary people[/tab]
[ch]C[/ch]                                  [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]
Maybe we should take it slow (Take it slow oh oh ohh)[/tab]
[ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]
This time we'll take it slow (Take it slow oh oh ohh)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]
This time we'll take it slow[/tab]

* when playing the last chord you might wanna add a little dramatic effect by stretching
out the word  "slow" and putting great emphasis on the G chord so you can ( like i said
before) Add dramatic effect.  for example: " This time we'll take 
it........................... Slow.
like put a long pause in between "take it" and "Slow" but not to long. ;D





* okay guys this is original chords. this if for those who dont know how to get all
fancy with playing this song, but is trying hard to find some place to actual give you
chords you understand! :D it might not be the best, there might be people out there who 
can do it better but i tried to provide you guys with pure awesomeness so thanks for viewing
please rate. and i hope you enjoy spreading the passion of love this song offers 
everywhere your heart ventures C:
